AboutSection.subtitle: Get to know me
AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.paragraph1: I merge creativity and technology to create impactful digital experiences. With a passion for clean code and elegant solutions, I transform complex problems into intuitive interfaces.
AboutSection.paragraph2: With expertise in FullStack Development, DevOps, and AI, I design innovative solutions with a minimalist approach. Every project is an opportunity to push boundaries.
